message:
feat(replay): artifact registry with manifest lifecycle management (ft-og6q6.6.4)

ArtifactRegistry provides structured TOML-backed lifecycle for .ftreplay
artifacts: list/inspect/add/retire/prune with SHA-256 integrity checks,
sensitivity tiers (T1/T2/T3), and pluggable FS backend for testability.
CLI subcommands added under ft replay artifact.

50 unit tests + 25 property tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
